channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: McLaren's Lando Norris wins wet and wild Australian Grand Prix. Hamilton finishes 10th
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — McLaren’s Lando Norris has won a chaotic rain-affected Australian Grand Prix, his first at Albert Park, with the Brit just managing to stay ahead of Red Bull’s Max Verstappen following a third safety car late in Sunday's race. Lewis Hamilton had a miserable Ferrari debut.
item.dc:creator: STEWART BELL, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: What to know about March Madness if you don’t follow college basketball
item.description: The college basketball season is winding down, which means March Madness is upon us. The annual men's and women's National Collegiate Athletic Association tournaments are among the most closely watched sporting events in the U.S.
item.dc:creator: BRIDGET BROWN, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Proctor, Knueppel carry No. 1 Duke past No. 13 Louisville 73-62 for 2nd ACC title in 3 years
item.description: CHARLOTTE, N.C. (AP) — Tyrese Proctor entered Saturday night's ACC championship 0 for 10 from beyond the 3-point arc in his previous two tournament games. That didn't keep him from letting it fly. Proctor made six 3-pointers and scored 19 points, tournament MVP Kon Knueppel added 18 points and No.
item.dc:creator: STEVE REED, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Dick Vitale tears up on ACC Championship broadcast while talking about recent cancer battle
item.description: Dick Vitale became emotional Saturday night while talking about his most recent cancer battle while announcing top-ranked Duke’s 73-62 victory over No. 13 Louisville in the Atlantic Coast Conference Tournament championship.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Suns' Bradley Beal still 'smiling every day' amid tumultuous season, but open to offseason trade
item.description: The Phoenix Suns were actively seeking to include Bradley Beal in a trade package last month, but the All-Star guard appears open to moving in the offseason.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 49ers trade top rusher Mason to Vikings in exchange for draft assets
item.description: Jordan Mason took over the 49ers' starting running back role when Christian McCaffrey was out injured.
item.dc:creator: Michael Nowels, The Mercury News

item.title: Bay FC begins second season on positive note with tie against Utah Royals
item.description: There did not appear to be any clouds lingering over the team after last week's news that its head coach was being investigated by the NWSL.
item.dc:creator: Andrew Aragon, The Mercury News

item.title: Draper knocks off 2-time defending champion Alcaraz to reach Indian Wells final
item.description: INDIAN WELLS, Calif. (AP) — Jack Draper toppled two-time defending champion Carlos Alcaraz 6-1, 0-6, 6-4 on Saturday to reach the BNP Paribas Open final. The 13th-seeded Draper will face 12th-seeded Holger Rune on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: No. 6 St. John's beats Creighton 82-66 for 1st Big East Tournament crown in 25 years
item.description: RJ Luis Jr. scored all but two of his 29 points after halftime and No. 6 St. John’s made 14 straight shots from the field in the second half to beat Creighton 82-66 for its first Big East Tournament title in 25 years.
item.dc:creator: Mike Fitzpatrick, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Duke says Cooper Flagg will play in NCAA Tournament after recent injury put him in wheelchair
item.description: Duke men's basketball forward Cooper Flagg will play in the NCAA Tournament even after sustaining an injury that put him in a wheelchair.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Former NBA player and Bill Russell recruit Donald 'Slick' Watts dies at 73
item.description: Donald "Slick" Watts, a former NBA player, has died at the age of 73 after becoming one of the league's Cinderella stories of the 1970s.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: No. 8 Tennessee downs No. 3 Auburn 70-65 to reach SEC Tournament championship game
item.description: NASHVILLE, Tenn. (AP) — Zakai Zeigler scored 20 points as No. 8 Tennessee held off regular-season champion and third-ranked Auburn 70-65 on Saturday to reach the Southeastern Conference Tournament championship for the first time since 2022.
item.dc:creator: TERESA M. WALKER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Dodgers' Betts dealing with illness in Japan, Roberts hopeful he'll be ready for opening day
item.description: TOKYO (AP) — Shortstop Mookie Betts will miss the Los Angeles Dodgers' two exhibition games in Japan because of an illness, manager Dave Roberts said Saturday.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jazz losing skid hits eight after 126-118 loss to Toronto
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - Scottie Barnes had 20 points and 10 rebounds, Immanuel Quickley also scored 20 points and the Toronto Raptors beat the Utah Jazz 126-118 on Friday night. A.J. Lawson added 18 points, RJ Barrett had 17 and Orlando Robinson finished with 14 points, 10 rebounds and five assists.
item.dc:creator: ABC 4

item.title: Plucky Lakers nearly beat Nuggets despite Luka Doncic, LeBron James among LA's sidelined starters
item.description: DENVER (AP) — Luka Doncic sat out the Los Angeles Lakers' 131-126 loss at Denver on Friday night, cheering on his scrappy, short-handed teammates who nearly pulled off a shocker without four starters.
item.dc:creator: ARNIE STAPLETON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ejiofor powers No. 6 St. John's past No. 25 Marquette 79-63 into 1st Big East final since 2000
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Zuby Ejiofor scored a career-high 33 points, a St. John's record in the Big East Tournament, and the sixth-ranked Red Storm pulled away from No. 25 Marquette 79-63 on Friday night to reach the conference championship game for the first time in 25 years.
item.dc:creator: MIKE FITZPATRICK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: No. 1 Duke holds off furious North Carolina rally to win 74-71, reach ACC title game without Flagg
item.description: CHARLOTTE, N.C. (AP) — Kon Knueppel scored 17 points and No. 1 Duke held off a furious second half rally by North Carolina to beat its rival for the third time this season, 74-71 on Friday night to reach the Atlantic Coast Conference Tournament championship game.
item.dc:creator: STEVE REED, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Tampa, Orlando line up to make pitch to bring Rays to their city
item.description: The development deal to build the Tampa Bay Rays a new stadium in St. Petersburg appears to be dead. Now, other groups are lining up to buy the team and take it to another city.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Patterson, WFLA, NBC

item.title: A loaded Thursday: Highlights from SIX games are here
item.description: It was a humongous Thursday of action on the Western Slope as winter sports reach their crescendo and spring sports continue to roll.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Right to Play Act aims to lift IHSA restrictions on high school athletes in club sports
item.description: Illinois State Rep. Janet Yang-Rohr has introduced House Bill 3037, the "Right to Play Act," which would eliminate the IHSA rules that restrict student-athletes from playing their sport during the high school season, potentially improving opportunities for college scholarships.
item.dc:creator: Dana Rebik, WGN 9

item.title: Third MLB hat pulled over accidental vulgarity as others sell for hundreds online
item.description: Yet another newly released MLB hat has been pulled from online stores after fans noted the potentially crass design the cap sported.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, WGN 9

item.title: Report: Bears signing former Commanders wide receiver in free agency
item.description: The Chicago Bears are signing free agent wide receiver Olamide Zaccheaus, who recorded a career-high 45 receptions for 506 yards and three TD catches with the Washington Commanders in 2024.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Cougars make 18 three-pointers in 96-92 victory
item.description: KANSAS CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Richie Saunders scored 23 points, hitting a crucial 3-pointer with less than a minute to go, and No. 17 BYU overcame a big game from Curtis Jones in a 96-90 victory over No.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Rays 'cannot move forward' with new ballpark deal, owner says
item.description: The Tampa Bay Rays will not be getting a new stadium in St. Petersburg under the existing deal, the team announced Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Tucker, WFLA, NBC

item.title: First pro boxer from Stanford shares journey on juggling fighting, academics
item.description: (KRON) -- Dante Kirkman is the first-ever professional boxer to come from Stanford. KRON4 spoke with Kirkman ahead of his March 8 fight against veteran Jose Cruz.
item.dc:creator: Erin Wilson, KRON4

item.title: Virginia track athlete facing assault charge after baton strike she said was accidental
item.description: Alaila Everett said it was an accident but court records show she is now facing a potential assault and battery charge.
item.dc:creator: Kenzie Finch, NewsNation

item.title: Palisade girls soccer escapes Montrose in 2024 SWL title rematch
item.description: It was a battle between two of the top Western Slope girls soccer teams at Long Family Memorial Park.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Saunders earns first team All-Big 12 honors
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Fresh off leading No. 17 BYU to its eighth straight win on Saturday, Richie Saunders was named the Big 12 Most Improved Player and claimed First Team All-Big honors. Egor Demin earned honorable mention all-conference and all-freshman accolades.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Report: Bears sign center Drew Dalman to 3-year deal
item.description: LAKE FOREST, Ill. — The Bears have signed top free agent center Drew Dalman, according to ESPN's Adam Schefter. The 26-year-old former Falcon completes an overhaul of the Bears' interior offensive line after Poles and company jumped the market by trading for guards Joe Thuney and Jonah Jackson.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, WGN 9

item.title: Bills release Von Miller in salary cap-saving move: Report
item.description: The move frees up at least $8.4 million in salary cap space, which comes close to matching how much the team was projected to be over the limit.
item.dc:creator: JOHN WAWROW, Associated Press, NewsNation
